popularStory.headline: Sir Thomas Leigh (c. 1504 – 15 November 1571 was an English merchant and Lord Mayor of London in 1558-59. He served as a City Alderman from 1552 until 1571.
popularStory.description:
Sir Thomas Leigh (c. 1504 – 15 November 1571[2]) was an English merchant and Lord Mayor of London in 1558-59. He served as a City Alderman from 1552 until 1571.

Life

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Leigh於大約1509年出生在英國瓦維其可爾斯同勒時，他的父親Sir William Leigh34歲，母親Lady Margery Morton23歲。他於1534年之前與Alice Barker在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1552年被列為city alderman 。他去世於1572年11月17日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯同勒享年64歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Leigh于大约1509年出生在英国瓦維其可爾斯同勒时，他的父亲Sir William Leigh34岁，母亲Lady Margery Morton23岁。他于1534年之前与Alice Barker在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1552年被列为city alderman 。他去世于1572年11月17日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯同勒享年64岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Leigh was born about 1509, in Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir William Leigh, was 34 and his mother, Lady Margery Morton, was 23. He married Alice Barker before 1534, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. In 1552, his occupation is listed as city alderman . He died on 17 November 1572, in Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Leigh est né environ 1509, à Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Leigh, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Margery Morton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Alice Barker avant 1534, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. En 1552, sa profession de son indiquée est city alderman . Il est décédé le 17 novembre 1572, à Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Leigh um 1509 in Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Leigh 34 und seine Mutter Lady Margery Morton 23. Er hat vor 1534 in England, United Kingdom Alice Barker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1552 ist sein Beruf als city alderman  aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. November 1572 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Leigh è nato il circa 1509 nel Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Leigh, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margery Morton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Alice Barker prima del 1534, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Nel 1552, la sua occupazione è indicata come city alderman . Morì il 17 novembre 1572, nel Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Leighが約1509年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストーニレイグで生まれた時，父Sir William Leighは34歳，母Lady Margery Mortonは23歳であった。1534年以前にイギリスイギリスでAlice Barkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。1552年，職業はcity alderman と記録されている。彼は1572年11月17日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストーニレイグで64歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Leigh(이)가 대략 1509년 영국 워윅실르 스톤리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Leigh(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margery Morton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1534년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alice Barker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1552년, 그의 직업은 city alderman 이었다. 그는 1572년 11월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스톤리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Leigh nasceu aproximadamente 1509, em Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Leigh, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margery Morton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Barker antes 1534, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Em 1552, sua profissão aparece como city alderman . Ele faleceu em 17 de novembro de 1572, em Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Leigh родился около 1509 г. в местности стоунелиг, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Leigh было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery Morton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Barker перед 1534 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. В 1552 году он работал по профессии city alderman . Он умер 17 ноября 1572 г. в местности стоунелиг, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Barker antes de 1534, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. En 1552, su ocupación registrada era city alderman . Murió el 17 de noviembre de 1572, en Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
